info.title: OpenWork Server V2
info.description:
OpenAPI contract for the standalone OpenWork Server V2 runtime and durable registry state.

Phase 10 makes Server V2 the default runtime, keeps release/runtime assets in a managed extracted directory, and closes the remaining cutover tooling around the standalone contract.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Server-level operational routes and contract metadata.

tags.name: Runtime
tags.description: Server-owned runtime supervision, versions, and child process health.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Workspace-first session and streaming primitives backed by OpenCode or remote OpenWork servers.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: Workspace-first message history and mutation primitives nested under sessions.

tags.name: Config
tags.description: Workspace-scoped config projection, raw config editing, and materialization owned by Server V2.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: Workspace-scoped file sessions, simple content routes, inbox, and artifact surfaces owned by Server V2.

tags.name: Reload
tags.description: Workspace-scoped reload events, reconciliation, and explicit runtime reload controls.

get.description: Returns the root metadata for the standalone Server V2 process and its route conventions.

500.description: The server failed to complete the request.
